title: Guru Purnima Celebration
description: Join us for the sacred celebration honoring our Gurus with traditional ceremonies, satsang, and cultural programs.

title: 10-Day Vipassana Retreat
description: An intensive silent meditation retreat following the ancient Vipassana tradition. Limited seats available.

title: Annual Convocation Ceremony
description: Celebrate the graduation of our students with traditional ceremonies, performances, and blessings from our Gurus.

title: Navaratri Cultural Festival
description: Nine nights of devotion, dance, music, and celebration. Special pujas and cultural programs throughout.

title: Yoga Teacher Training Begins
description: New batch of our certified 500-hour Yoga Teacher Training program. Applications now open.

title: Sanskrit Summer Camp
description: Intensive Sanskrit learning camp for beginners and intermediate learners. Residential program available.
